subject: Re: Bob Goldsmt etc
body:
ok for freya


----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, April 14, 2008 11:30:12 AM
Subject: FW: Bob Goldsmt etc


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 




From: BEHNBOM@aol.com [mailto:BEHNBOM@aol.com] 
Sent: Friday, April 11, 2008 8:30 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Bob Goldsmt etc


Good Morning, Jeffrey!
Bob is anxious to talk to you...I promised to remind you to contact him if possible today! I did meet with him and I actually did convey the idea of picking up some business attire...he seemed thankful but didnt take me up on it..he had ok clothes on and actually seemed on the go...so he is all set to finally make it happen..
I am flying to Sweden tomorrw to interview FEOY candidates... and arrange 
for SALSS...working with Freja, she is excellent. I got her a ticket here for May 5th until May 17...hopefully it can work with you helping out with an apt to stay in? then she wants to come back 3rd week of June..she likes it here ..and so far we can work it out so we can work together both here and there...
 
How is it going with Neil Livingstone and his associates? I visited down there and met the former head of CIA a nice guy who loved Sweden....I hope the whole thing could be dismissed on technicality.?! Hang in there, I think it's going to be ok!
 
Also, forever thank you for keeping FEYO and BBB running, received the additional 25,000 dollar check which I will bring personally to the school.
At the formal graduation last week at Stockholm townhall, similar pomp and circumstance but pretty young people instead of old bags, the president of the school expressed his gratitude for the scholarship and BBB...ok!
Lots of love, Barbro






Planning your summer road trip? Check out AOL Travel Guides.
